title: Light Savory Russian Carrot Blanched Dumplings
description: A delicate, comforting Russian vegetarian dish featuring cardamom and blanched carrots.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring 4 cups of water to a boil. Blanch the carrots for 5-7 minutes, or until tender.
Drain the carrots and let them cool to room temperature.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, cold unsalted butter, and water. Mix until the dough comes together.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it is smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a ball and flatten it slightly into a disk.
Place a tablespoon of cooled carrots in the center of each dough disk. Fold the dough over the carrots and press the edges to seal.
In a large pot of boiling water, cook the dumplings for 5-7 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh dill if desired.
